title: Research Associate (Dept of Pharmacology)
description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS Career Portal

Your application will be processed only if you apply via NUS Career Portal

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Description

The National University of Singapore invites applications for a Research Associate for “Engineered extracellular vesicles for anti-cancer therapy (EVANTICA)” in the Department of Pharmacology, Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine.  Teaching and research activities in our department range from clinical pharmacology, systems pharmacology, to basic molecular and cellular pharmacology. More information on the department is available at http://medicine.nus.edu.sg/medphc/index.html.

We are seeking a highly motivated and talented Research Associate  to join Prof Minh Le’s lab

Purpose of the post

The Research Associate will conduct laboratory research involving cell culture, microscopy, molecular assays, and animal experiments. The role involves close collaboration with the Principal Investigator and research team, as well as providing support for laboratory logistics and selected administrative tasks to ensure smooth day-to-day operations.

Main duties and responsibilities

The RA will be able to:

  1. Design and perform the experiments related to the research project;
  2. Analyze experimental data and assist in the preparation of reports and scientific publications;
  3. Assist the general logistics of the project, including procurement of lab consumables and reagents;
  4. Handle laboratory safety documentation, including preparation, archiving, and regular updates;
  5. Provide administrative support to the Principal Investigator when needed;

Qualifications

The applicant should:

  1. Hold at least a Master’s degree  in Life Sciences or a related field.
  2. Prior experience in laboratory-based research is preferred.
  3. Good English communication skills

Desired Attributes

  1. 1-2 years hands-on experience with basic laboratory techniques.
  2. Able to work independently as well as in a team,
  3. Well-organized, attentive to detail, responsible, and able to manage time and work efficiently.

Remuneration will be commensurate with the candidate’s qualifications and experience.

Formal application: Please submit your application, indicating current/expected salary, supported by a detailed CV (including personal particulars, academic and employment history, complete list of publications/oral presentations and full contacts of 3 referees to the NUS Career Portal.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
The National University of Singapore aspires to be a vital community of academics, researchers, staff, students and alumni working together in a spirit of innovation and enterprise for a better world.

 

Our singular focus on talent will be the cornerstone of a truly great university that is dedicated to quality education, influential research and visionary enterprise, in service of country and society.
